product: Genie API enhancements and SQL function improvements
tagline: New Genie API endpoints in Public Preview: You can now use the Genie API to list all conversations in a space, delete conversations, and delete Genie Spaces.
what_it_does: New Genie API endpoints in Public Preview: You can now use the Genie API to list all conversations in a space, delete conversations, and delete Genie Spaces. More selective application of SQL functions in Genie: Genie's ability to apply SQL functions to relevant user questions has been improved. Genie Genie provides a no code experience for business users, powered by AI/BI.
why_it_matters: More selective application of SQL functions in Genie: Genie's ability to apply SQL functions to relevant user questions has been improved.
key_takeaway: New Genie API endpoints in Public Preview: You can now use the Genie API to list all conversations in a space, delete conversations, and delete Genie Spaces.
